entry.title: No More Birthdays
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,204Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Damian had realized he was in love with Tim Drake when he was twelve years old. Ten years later hes finally accepted that hes never going to get over his feelings, nor will they be reciprocated, So, he figures he will do the next best thing. Having Tim's baby. What? OR, Damian wants a kid, and who better to father it than the man Damian has been infatuated with for years?

entry.title: you're a good brother
entry.summary:
Author: DairyFarmer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 134

Summary: Dick tried talking to Jason, tried pleading. It didn’t work. Jason was angry. Angrier than Dick had ever seen him. "I knew I should've pulled the plug ages ago, I knew it's what Timmy would've wanted- you people never gave a shit about what HE wanted!" Jason looked like he wanted to spit in both their faces. ---Tim wasn't dead. It didn't matter what anyone said, he wasn't dead. Not to Dick. Or Dick loves his brother. He wants to do right by him. It doesn't land.

Author: Mimikozyz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,223Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: And I know I said go slow, but I can't hold back no more Tim is a great pretender, he knows how to stay in line, to dangle over the edge, careful not to dip his feet in. Tim is not a good person, but he's good at denying, denying everything, every spark. Are you gonna be the one that's on my mind?3-6-5, all the time Grief driven Tim tried to fix things but it leaves them broken and worse. Tim doesn't let things leak, he lets it build up until it explodes, leaving everything ruined. Tim is ruining Damian.

entry.title: miss american dream
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,415Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 268

Summary: The biting, frigid winter wind hit Tim like a freight train as he sauntered down the dark, grimy streets of Park Row. His gut told him that a snowstorm was most likely headed their way, but with Gotham’s near-constant shitty weather, it was hard to tell most of the time. He had made the foolish decision of wearing a crop top and mini skirt, only covered by a cheap faux-fur coat one of the girls gave him as a hand-me-down. It barely did anything to combat the cold temperature, but at least he looked absolutely fuckable enough for any potential customers. The only problem was that the dark streets of Park Row were empty as Tim went through his usual nightly route.  Tim had come to accept that he would rot in this sleepless city that he called home, but he didn’t think it would be so soon.After waking up from a coma with no memories intact, Timothy tries to survive by selling his body in the dark and cruel streets of Gotham City.

entry.title: Trolley Problems
entry.summary:
Author: loveyouonpurpose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,279Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Damian is simply an extension of his Father's will. He knows he will never be more than his Father's Monsterous Creation. So when a portal opens up and alternate versions of Batman and Superman rescue his brothers- he is unsurprised when they see him as nothing more than a willing accomplice. OR: My take on byrambles Another Mirror but add mutual non-con!

entry.title: ‘Till your blood goes blue
entry.summary:
Author: sole_braincell

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,782Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: Tim is de-aged and forced to have a mission in Damian’s school to fix it. Only to find a world unknown to the Waynes.  Damian’s civllian high-school life, apparently, is nothing he or any of the Wayne’s had ever imagined. And how exactly does romancing Tim Drake factor in all this? Well, it just happens. Blame the amazing teenage brain and hormones. For sure, Tim is blaming his fate of being in the perpetual state of puberty, and Damian's skipping his own.

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,949Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,370Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 97

Summary: "Go ahead and ask your questions now, Tim," Father invites. "What are we doing, B?" "If you're both comfortable, I still owe it to you to make up for how I treated you on Damian's birthday." "Okay… And how…?" Father's hands ghost up and down Damian's body, slow and soft. It feels nice, and his eyelids flutter. "I thought we could share." Another flood of arousal drips around him at the thought. "Would you like that, Tim?" "Yeah," he breathes, eyes going wide. Father chuckles. "And based on the way your brother just squeezed down on me when I said that, I think he might like the idea, too."
